---
title: Send reCaptcha v2 Task
lang: en-US
---

# Send reCaptcha v2 image Task `POST`

This method sends a reCaptcha image solve task to the api server.

`COST: 7000 requests per 1$ or 1 credit for daily plan.`

::: warning
#### WORK IN PROGRESS
Visit [`Prepare Captcha Data`](./PrepareData) prepare payload data for sending

:::

## Send reCaptcha Task

::: code-group

```JavaScript
const baseurl = "https://beta.nocaptchaai.com/solve";
  const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    apikey: settings.apikey,
  };

const images_base64 = {"0" "base64 of the full image"}; // get all the images pushed to array

const payload = {
        images: images_base64,
        target: "bicycle", // "a fire hydrant", "taxi" etc
        // split_33 for dynamic secondary 3x3 grid images
        type: "split_33", // "33" => 3x3 grid iamge , "44" => for 4x4
        method: "recaptcha2",
      },

async function solve(images, target) {
  const request = await fetch(proapi, {
    method: "post",
    headers: {
      "Content-type": "application/json",
      apikey: apikey,
    },
    body: JSON.stringify(base64_json),
  }).then((response) => {
      return  console.log(response.json());
    });
}
```


:::

## Task Payloads
::: code-group
```json [3x3]
{
    "images": {
        "0": ""
    },
    "target": "a fire hydrant",
    "type": 33,
    "method": "recaptcha2"
}
```
```json [4x4]
{
    "images": {
        "0": ""
    },
    "target": "fire hydrants",
    "type": 44,
    "method": "recaptcha2"
}
```
```json [Split_3x3]
{
    "images": {
        "2": ""
    },
    "target": "a fire hydrant",
    "type": "split_33",
    "method": "recaptcha2"
}
```
::: 
## Task RESPONSE
::: code-group
```json [response 3x3]
{
    "solution": [
        8,
        9,
        10,
        12,
        13,
        14
    ],
    "status": "solved",
    "target": "bicycles"
}
```

```json [response 4x4]
{
    "solution": [
        2, 4, 8
    ],
    "status": "solved",
    "target": "a fire hydrant"
}
```
:::
